---
title: Actualités de l'ALISP
description: >
  un paragraphe de description (ou pas)
listing:
  contents:
    - "**/*.qmd"
    - "**/*.md"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - reading-time
    - image
    - description
    - categories
  feed: true
  image-align: left
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
---

Eventuellent un autre paragraphe
